changes: Searing Flash potency has been increased from 600 to 700.
Umbral Impulse potency has been increased from 620 to 640.
Umbral Flare potency has been increased from 280 to 300.
Sunflare potency has been increased from 800 to 1,000.

new_content.name: Cosmic Exploration: Oizys
new_content.description: A new destination for the Cosmic Exploration Initiative, featuring stellar missions, projects, Oizys credits, exploration tokens, and Starward Standings.
new_content.location: Oizys (Accessed from Mare Lamentorum or other Cosmic Exploration destinations)
new_content.npc_location: Searchingway at Phaenna (X:27.2 Y:13.8) for initial quest "Mission of Gravity"

new_content.name: Phantom Weapon Enhancement Quests
new_content.description: New sidequests to enhance the strength of phantom weapons, leading to enhanced weapons based on the job used to complete the quests.
new_content.npc_location: Lydirceil at The Phantom Village (X:6.6 Y:7.1) for quests; Dodokkuli at The Phantom Village (X:6.7 Y:7.1) for additional enhancements
